overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person walk through a futuristic coastal city. The journey begins on a sunny elevated promenade with palm trees overlooking skyscrapers, descends past a crashed van to street level, enters a modern glass building, ascends stairs through a dark passage, and emerges into a neon-lit commercial plaza with food vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated coastal promenade with panoramic city views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated walkway observing futuristic cityscape and distant roller coaster

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with illuminated signage reading WILD BLUE
tropical palm trees lining the promenade railing
low concrete safety barrier along walkway edge
large metal amusement park roller coaster framework visible in distance
cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with digital billboards

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day along an elevated coastal walkway. Palm trees line the concrete path as the camera moves forward, revealing a futuristic cityscape with the prominent Wild Blue tower on the left and a distant roller coaster structure on the right. The environment is open and exposed with clear skies.

events.description: descends from elevated promenade to lower street level with scattered debris and wreckage

agents.ego_description: moving down ramp to street level, navigating past debris and abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: NPC walking along the debris-strewn road in opposite direction

entered.detail: abandoned white van crashed into debris pile with damaged rear section
stacked colorful cargo containers near waterfront
large metal pipe structures extending over the road

segments.scene_description: The camera descends from the promenade to a lower road level littered with debris and wreckage. A crashed van sits prominently in the center of the frame as the camera moves past it. The roller coaster structure shifts to the left side of view while shipping containers and industrial pipes appear on the right near the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern glass building exterior with covered walkway

events.description: turns corner and walks along modern glass building with red paved walkway
enters shadow of building overhang, creating mixed lighting conditions

agents.ego_description: walking along building exterior approaching entrance, passing parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket walking along the road near parked cars

entered.detail: large angular structure with extensive glass facade and dark metal framework
dark colored sedan parked along the building entrance
colorful pride flag mounted on pole near building entrance
low concrete divider separating walkway from lower level

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the exterior of a modern glass building with a distinctive angular design. The walkway features red paving tiles and a concrete barrier. A rainbow flag is visible near the entrance as the camera approaches the building's covered entrance area, transitioning from full sunlight to mixed lighting under the overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete stairwell connecting building levels

events.description: enters dark covered stairwell with artificial lighting, transitioning from bright exterior
ascends stairs and emerges into covered commercial plaza with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs through covered passage, following other pedestrians upward

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing ascending stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with striped safety markings ascending to upper level
black metal handrail along stairwell edge
smooth gray concrete walls with horizontal red stripes
recessed ceiling lights illuminating the dark stairwell

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark, enclosed concrete stairwell with artificial lighting, transitioning dramatically from the bright exterior. The stairs ascend between smooth concrete walls with safety stripes. Other pedestrians are visible climbing ahead as the camera moves upward toward a lit exit at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark neon-lit commercial plaza with food vendors and vending machines

events.description: lighting shifts to dark environment with vibrant pink and blue neon signs illuminating the plaza
passing through denser crowd near food stalls and automated vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking through busy commercial plaza observing neon signs, food stalls, and various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red tank top walking past food stall

entered.detail: dark food vendor booth with bright pink neon signage and chrome stools
illuminated automated food and drink dispensers with colorful displays
massive angled support column with purple and white striped base
blue cylindrical garbage can overflowing with debris

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell into a dark, cavernous commercial plaza illuminated by vibrant neon signs. The environment features food stalls with pink neon lighting, automated vending machines, and scattered crowds of pedestrians. Massive concrete pillars support the overhead structure while the camera moves through this cyberpunk-style marketplace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open coastal promenade into a dark, neon-lit subterranean marketplace. It begins along a sunny elevated walkway lined with palm trees, moving past the Wild Blue tower and a distant roller coaster under clear skies. As the camera descends to a lower road level, the open vista shifts toward industrial wreckage and a crashed van before gliding along the red-tiled exterior of an angular glass building. The scene then moves from the sunlight into the shadows of a dark concrete stairwell, ascending past other pedestrians toward a distant light. Finally, the camera emerges from the stairs into a cavernous commercial plaza, where the environment transforms into a cyberpunk marketplace filled with pink neon food stalls and massive concrete pillars.
